revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 鍬戸神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=三島市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[三島市]]長伏1 |位置 = {{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[倭文神]]（もしくは不詳） |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=鍬戸神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''鍬戸神社'''（くわとじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[三島市]]長伏（ながぶせ）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 三島市の南西部、長伏地区の北端、境川の東岸に、松本地区の[[高橋神社 (三島市)|高橋神社]]と隣接（南接）する形で鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である[[倭文神社]]（しとりじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 くわとの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[倭文神]]（もしくは不詳）
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁

revision.comment: Created page with "'''Shidori Shrine''' (倭文神社) refers to Shinto shrines bearing the name "Shidori" (also read as Shizuri, Shitori, or Shidori). These shrines enshrine '''{{ill|Takahatsuchi-no-Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|zh|天羽槌雄神|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto}}''' (also known as '''Amenohaikazuchi-no-Mikoto''', '''Ameno Hachio''', or '''Takehatsuchi''') as the '''deity of weaving''', alongside '''{{ill|Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神}}'''..."
revision.text:
'''Shidori Shrine''' (倭文神社) refers to Shinto shrines bearing the name "Shidori" (also read as Shizuri, Shitori, or Shidori).
These shrines enshrine '''{{ill|Takahatsuchi-no-Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|zh|天羽槌雄神|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto}}''' (also known as '''Amenohaikazuchi-no-Mikoto''', '''Ameno Hachio''', or '''Takehatsuchi''') as the '''deity of weaving''', alongside '''{{ill|Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神}}''' (also known as '''Amano Yachichihime''' or '''Amanoorihime'''). These shrines were established by the '''{{ill|Shidori clan|ja|倭文氏}}''', who worshipped Takahatsuchi-no-Mikoto as their ancestral deity.
The '''origin of these shrines is attributed to''' the '''{{ill|Katsuraki Shitori ni Imasu Ame no Ha Ikazuchi no Mikoto Shrine|ja|葛木倭文座天羽雷命神社}}''' in '''Katsuragi, Nara Prefecture'''. However, while the introduction and promotion of silk weaving technology in Japan is credited to '''{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}''', some Shidori Shrines claim their origins date back to the reign of '''{{ill|Emperor Sujin|ja|崇神天皇}}'''. Therefore, these shrines provide '''important historical evidence''' regarding '''when and where silk weaving developed in Japan (Wa).'''
Additionally, in the '''2016 animated film "Your Name"''', the fictional '''{{ill|Miyamizu Shrine|ja|宮水神社}}''' is depicted as enshrining '''Shidori deity Takehatsuchi-no-Mikoto'''.
== Major Shidori Shrines ==
The following shrines are listed in the '''{{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}''':
* '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Shidori-go, Nanba District, Kōzuke Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Isesaki)|ja|倭文神社 (伊勢崎市)}} (Higashi-Kaminomiya-cho, {{ill|Isesaki, Gunma|ja|伊勢崎市}}, [[Gunma Prefecture]]) * '''Shizuka Shrine (静神社)''' in '''Kuji District, Hitachi Province''' – {{ill|Shizuka Shrine|ja|静神社}} ({{ill|Naka, Ibaraki|ja|那珂市}}, [[Ibaraki Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Koma District, Kai Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nirasaki)|ja|倭文神社 (韮崎市)}} (Miyakubo, {{ill|Nirasaki, Yamanashi|ja|韮崎市}}, [[Yamanashi Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Fuji District, Suruga Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja|倭文神社 (富士宮市)}} (Hoshiyama, {{ill|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|ja|富士宮市}}, [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Tagata District, Izu Province''' – Identified with multiple candidate shrines, including '''{{ill|Kuwado Shrine|ja|鍬戸神社}}''' ({{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|ja|三島市}}, [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Suzuka District, Ise Province''' – '''{{ill|Kasado Shrine|ja|加佐登神社}}''' (merged into [[Suzuka, Mie|鈴鹿市]], [[Mie Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Kasa District, Tango Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Maizuru)|ja|倭文神社 (舞鶴市)}} (Imada, {{ill|Maizuru, Kyoto|ja|舞鶴市}}, [[Kyoto Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Yosa District, Tango Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Yosano)|ja|倭文神社 (与謝野町)}} (Mikawachi, {{ill|Yosano, Kyoto|ja|与謝野町}}, [[Kyoto Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Asago District, Tajima Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Asago)|ja|倭文神社 (朝来市)}} (Maruyama, {{ill|Asago, Hyogo|ja|朝来市}}, [[Hyogo Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Takakusa District, Inaba Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (鳥取市)}} (Shidori, {{ill|Tottori, Tottori|ja|鳥取市}}, [[Tottori Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Kawamura District, Hōki Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Yurihama)|ja|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)}} (Miyauchi, {{ill|Yurihama, Tottori|ja|湯梨浜町}}, [[Tottori Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Kume District, Hōki Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Kurayoshi)|ja|倭文神社 (倉吉市)}} (Shizu, {{ill|Kurayoshi, Tottori|ja|倉吉市}}, [[Tottori Prefecture]])
Other notable Shidori Shrines include:
* '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tono)|ja|倭文神社 (遠野市)}}''' (Tsuchibuchi-cho, {{ill|Tono, Iwate|ja|遠野市}}, [[Iwate Prefecture]]) * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nara)|ja|倭文神社 (奈良市)}}''' (Nishikujo-cho, {{ill|Nara, Nara|ja|奈良市}}, [[Nara Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Shidori-go, Kume District, Mimasaka Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tsuyama)|ja|倭文神社 (津山市油木北)}} (Yukikita, {{ill|Tsuyama, Okayama|ja|津山市}}, [[Okayama Prefecture]]) * '''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)''' in '''Shidori-go, Mihara District, Awaji Province''' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Awaji)|ja|倭文神社 (あわじ市倭文委文)}} (Shidori, {{ill|Minamiawaji, Hyogo|ja|南あわじ市}}, [[Hyogo Prefecture]])
Additionally, '''{{ill|Oomiwa Shrine|ja|大甕神社}}''' ({{ill|Hitachi, Ibaraki|ja|日立市}}, [[Ibaraki Prefecture]]) also enshrines '''Takehatsuchi-no-Mikoto'''. Similarly, '''{{ill|Ishii Shrine|ja|石井神社}}''' ({{ill|Kasama, Ibaraki|ja|笠間市}}, [[Ibaraki Prefecture]]) enshrines the same deity, with a large sacred rock called "Mitarai" located to the south.
== Related Topics ==
* '''{{ill|Takehatsuchi-no-Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|zh|天羽槌雄神|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto}}''' (also known as Amenohaikazuchi-no-Mikoto) * '''{{ill|Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神}}''' (also known as Amanoorihime)

[[Category:Imported Shinto cults]] [[Category:kk]][[ja:倭文神社]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Shinto shrines by tradition]] [[Category:Imported Shinto cults]] [[Category:kk]][[ja:倭文神社]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Shizuri Shrines]] [[Category:倭文神社]][[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:Shizuri Faith]]{{Shizuri Faith}}[[Category:Shizuri Faith]] [[ja:倭文神社|しすりしんしや]] [[Category:Shizuri Shrines forks]]

''Shidori Shrine'' (倭文神社) refers to Shinto shrines bearing the name "Shidori" (also read as Shizuri, Shitori, or Shidori).
These shrines enshrine ''{{ill|Takahatsuchi-no-Mikoto|ja|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|zh|天羽槌雄神|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto}}'' (also known as ''Amenohaikazuchi-no-Mikoto'', ''Ameno Hachio'', or ''Takehatsuchi'') as the ''deity of weaving'', alongside ''{{ill|Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神}}'' (also known as ''Amano Yachichihime'' or ''Amanoorihime''). These shrines were established by the ''{{ill|Shidori clan|ja|倭文氏}}'', who worshipped Takahatsuchi-no-Mikoto as their ancestral deity.
The ''origin of these shrines is attributed to'' the ''{{ill|Katsuraki Shitori ni Imasu Ame no Ha Ikazuchi no Mikoto Shrine|ja|葛木倭文座天羽雷命神社}}'' in ''Katsuragi, Nara Prefecture''. However, while the introduction and promotion of silk weaving technology in Japan is credited to ''{{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}'', some Shidori Shrines claim their origins date back to the reign of ''{{ill|Emperor Sujin|ja|崇神天皇}}''. Therefore, these shrines provide ''important historical evidence'' regarding ''when and where silk weaving developed in Japan (Wa).''
Additionally, in the ''2016 animated film "Your Name"'', the fictional ''{{ill|Miyamizu Shrine|ja|宮水神社}}'' is depicted as enshrining ''Shidori deity Takehatsuchi-no-Mikoto''.
== Major Shidori Shrines ==
The following shrines are listed in the ''{{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}'':
* ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Shidori-go, Nanba District, Kōzuke Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Isesaki)|ja|倭文神社 (伊勢崎市)}} (Higashi-Kaminomiya-cho, {{ill|Isesaki, Gunma|ja|伊勢崎市}}, [[Gunma Prefecture]]) * ''Shizuka Shrine (静神社)'' in ''Kuji District, Hitachi Province'' – {{ill|Shizuka Shrine|ja|静神社}} ({{ill|Naka, Ibaraki|ja|那珂市}}, [[Ibaraki Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Koma District, Kai Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nirasaki)|ja|倭文神社 (韮崎市)}} (Miyakubo, {{ill|Nirasaki, Yamanashi|ja|韮崎市}}, [[Yamanashi Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Fuji District, Suruga Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja|倭文神社 (富士宮市)}} (Hoshiyama, {{ill|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|ja|富士宮市}}, [[Shizuoka Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Tagata (倭文神社)'' in ''Suzuka District, Ise Province'' – ''{{ill|Kasado Shrine|ja|加佐登神社}}'' (merged into [[Suzuka, Mie|鈴鹿市]], [[Mie Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Kasa District, Tango Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Maizuru)|ja|倭文神社 (舞鶴市)}} (Imada, {{ill|Maizuru, Kyoto|ja|舞鶴市}}, [[Kyoto Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Yosa District, Tango Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Yosano)|ja|倭文神社 (与謝野町)}} (Mikawachi, {{ill|Yosano, Kyoto|ja|与謝野町}}, [[Kyoto Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Asago District, Tajima Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Asago)|ja|倭文神社 (朝来市)}} (Maruyama, {{ill|Asago, Hyogo|ja|朝来市}}, [[Hyogo Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Takakusa District, Inaba Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (鳥取市)}} (Shidori, {{ill|Tottori, Tottori|ja|鳥取市}}, [[Tottori Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Kawamura District, Hōki Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Yurihama)|ja|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)}} (Miyauchi, {{ill|Yurihama, Tottori|ja|湯梨浜町}}, [[Tottori Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Kume District, Hōki Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Kurayoshi)|ja|倭文神社 (倉吉市)}} (Shizu, {{ill|Kurayoshi, Tottori|ja|倉吉市}}, [[Tottori Prefecture]])
Other notable Shidori Shrines include:
* ''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tono)|ja|倭文神社 (遠野市)}}'' (Tsuchibuchi-cho, {{ill|Tono, Iwate|ja|遠野市}}, [[Iwate Prefecture]]) * ''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nara)|ja|倭文神社 (奈良市)}}'' (Nishikujo-cho, {{ill|Nara, Nara|ja|奈良市}}, [[Nara Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Shidori-go, Kume District, Mimasaka Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tsuyama)|ja|倭文神社 (津山市油木北)}} (Yukikita, {{ill|Tsuyama, Okayama|ja|津山市}}, [[Okayama Prefecture]]) * ''Shidori Shrine (倭文神社)'' in ''Shidori-go, Mihara District, Awaji Province'' – {{ill|Shidori Shrine (Awaji)|ja|倭文神社 (あわじ市倭文委文)}} (Shidori, {{ill|Minamiawaji, Hyogo|ja|南あわじ市}}, [[Hyogo Prefecture]])
Additionally, ''{{ill|Oomiwa Shrine|ja|大甕神社}}'' ({{ill|Hitachi, Ibaraki|ja|日立市}}, [[Ibaraki Prefecture]]) also enshrines ''Takehatsuchi-no-Mikoto''. Similarly, ''{{ill|Ishii Shrine|ja|石井神社}}'' ({{ill|Kasama, Ibaraki|ja|笠間市}}, [[Ibaraki Prefecture]]) enshrines the same deity, with a large sacred rock called "Mitarai" located to the south.

Similarly, ''{{ill|Ishii Shrine|en}}[[Category:Pages to be written]] <!--Kuwado Shrine--> [[ja:石井神社]]'' ({{ill|Kasama, Ibaraki|en}}[[Category:Pages to be written]] <!--Kuwado Shrine--> [[ja:笠間市]], [[Ibaraki Prefecture]]) enshrines the same deity, with a large sacred rock called "Mitarai" located to the south.

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 鍬戸神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=三島市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[三島市]]長伏1 |位置 = {{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[倭文神]]（もしくは不詳） |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=鍬戸神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''鍬戸神社'''（くわとじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[三島市]]長伏（ながぶせ）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 三島市の南西部、長伏地区の北端、境川の東岸に、松本地区の[[高橋神社 (三島市)|高橋神社]]と隣接（南接）する形で鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''[[倭文神社]]'''（しとりじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 くわとの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[倭文神]]（もしくは不詳）
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:くわとしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 鍬戸神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=三島市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[三島市]]長伏1 |位置 = {{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[倭文神]]（もしくは不詳） |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=鍬戸神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''鍬戸神社'''（くわとじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[三島市]]長伏（ながぶせ）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 三島市の南西部、長伏地区の北端、境川の東岸に、松本地区の[[高橋神社 (三島市)|高橋神社]]と隣接（南接）する形で鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''[[倭文神社]]'''（しとりじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 くわとの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[倭文神]]（もしくは不詳）
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:くわとしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:Https://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[ja:%E9%8D%AC%E6%88%B8%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE]][[ja:&action=edit]]

'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Nagabuse (長伏), [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>

== Overview ==
It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|qq=|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.

Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|qq=|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|qq=|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>

== Deities ==
* {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)

'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Nagabuse (長伏), [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>

== Overview ==
It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|qq=|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.

Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|qq=|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|qq=|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>

== Deities ==
* {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)

'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Nagabuse (長伏), [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)

'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Nagabuse (長伏), [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)

'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Nagabuse (長伏), [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>

== Overview ==
It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.

Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>

== Deities ==
* {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)

== Overview ==
It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.

Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>

Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |Foundation = |Main hall = |Alias = |Fuda-sho etc = |Annual festival = October 15 |Shinto rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }}
'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Nagabuse (長伏), [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |Foundation = |Main hall = |Alias = |Fuda-sho etc = |Annual festival = October 15 |Shinto rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }}
'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Nagabuse (長伏), [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Nagabuse (長伏), [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Nagabuse (長伏), [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office
{{Shizuri Faith}}

{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |Foundation = |Main hall = |Alias = |Fuda-sho etc = |Annual festival = October 15 |Shinto rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }}
'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Nagabuse (長伏), [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of [[:en:Mishima, Shizuoka|Mishima City]], at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 6 ([[:en:1873|1873]]), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office
{{Shizuri Faith}}
{{translated page|ja|鍬戸神社|version=103460164|comment=Imported full ja history}}

'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in Nagabuse (長伏), {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City}}, at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|1873|en|1873|WD=Q7757|lt=1873}}), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office
{{Shizuri Faith}}

In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|1873|en|1873|WD=Q7757|lt=1873}}), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)

'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in Nagabuse (長伏), {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City}}, at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|1873|en|1873|WD=Q7757|lt=1873}}), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |Name = Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat=三島市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture}} {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City}} Nagabuse 1 |Coordinates = {{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deity = {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown) |Rank = Former {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}, {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |Foundation = |Main hall = |Alias = |Fuda-sho etc = |Annual festival = October 15 |Shinto rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }}
'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in Nagabuse (長伏), {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City}}, at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|1873|en|1873|WD=Q7757|lt=1873}}), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office
{{Shizuri Faith}}
{{translated page|ja|鍬戸神社|version=103460164|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |Name = Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat=三島市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture}} {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City}} Nagabuse 1 |Coordinates = {{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deity = {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown) |Rank = Former {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}, {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |Foundation = |Main hall = |Alias = |Fuda-sho etc = |Annual festival = October 15 |Shinto rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }}
'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in Nagabuse (長伏), {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City}}, at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrine (worship)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Izu Kokushinkaichō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|1873|en|1873|WD=Q7757|lt=1873}}), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office
{{Shizuri Faith}}
{{translated page|ja|鍬戸神社|version=103460164|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |Name = Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat=三島市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}} {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}} Nagabuse 1 |Coordinates = {{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deity = {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown) |Rank = Former {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}, {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |Foundation = |Main hall = |Alias = |Fuda-sho etc = |Annual festival = October 15 |Shinto rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }}
'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Nagabuse (長伏), {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|WD=Q653478|lt=Mishima City|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}}, at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Q17193087|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|1873|en|1873|WD=Q7757|lt=1873|1=1873}}), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office
{{Shizuri Faith}}
{{translated page|ja|鍬戸神社|version=103460164|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |Name = Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社) |image = {{Image needed|cat=三島市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}} {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|qid=Q653478|lt=Mishima City|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}} Nagabuse 1 |Coordinates = {{coord|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deity = {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown) |Rank = Former {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}, {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} |Foundation = |Main hall = |Alias = |Fuda-sho etc = |Annual festival = October 15 |Shinto rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|33.6|N|138|54|57|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }}
'''Kuwado Shrine (鍬戸神社)''' is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Nagabuse (長伏), {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|qid=Q653478|lt=Mishima City|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 鍬戸神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>
== Overview == It is located in the southwestern part of {{ill|Mishima, Shizuoka|en|Mishima, Shizuoka|qid=Q653478|lt=Mishima City|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}}, at the northern end of the Nagabuse district, on the east bank of the Sakai River, adjacent (to the south) to the Matsumoto district's {{ill|Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|ja|高橋神社 (三島市)|lt=Takahashi Shrine|lt_ja=高橋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Shrine (Mishima City)|1=Takahashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q134928492}}.
Its foundation is unknown, but it is identified with the '''{{ill|Shitori Jinja|ja|倭文神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori Jinja|1=Shizuri Shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11387088}}''' (しとりじんじゃ), a designated {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and is recorded in the '{{ill|Izu Kokushinkaichō|ja|伊豆国神階帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Kokushinkaichō|1=Q17193087|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17193087}}' as "Jūshi'i-jō Kuwado no Myōjin."<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/kuwato_title.htm 鍬戸神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140204-02.html 鍬戸神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>
In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|1873|en|1873|qid=Q7757|lt=1873|1=1873}}), it was Ranked as a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}.<ref name="engi"/>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shitori no Kami|ja|倭文神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|lt=Shizuri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitori no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehazuchi|qq=}} (or unknown)
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External links == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402053 Kuwado Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office
